revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-125 

The set of electrical and mechanical quantities assigned to a machine or apparatus by the manufacturer, to define the performance under specified conditions. Values are often stated on a rating plate.

{{IALAFooter}}
